description: insert four rows via @sql endpoint using multiple INSERT statements

body: INSERT INTO t{{SQLUUID}} (id, name, score, active, note) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 95.5, 1, 'founder')
INSERT INTO t{{SQLUUID}} (id, name, score, active, note) VALUES (2, 'Bob', 72.3, 1, 'member')
INSERT INTO t{{SQLUUID}} (id, name, score, active, note) VALUES (3, 'Carol', 88.5, 0, 'inactive')
INSERT INTO t{{SQLUUID}} (id, name, score, active, note) VALUES (4, 'Dave', 61.7, 1, 'member')
